title: Paramount and Warner Bros. merger blocked by temporary restraining order one day before close
summary: Paramount called the restraining order “ one of the weakest merger challenges in modern antitrust history ” and argued the deal would stabilise basic cable television, increase theatrical releases, and create jobs in film production.
caption: output/2026-07-20/paramount-and-warner-bros-merger-blocked-by-temporary-restraining-orde.txt
